summary: Clear audience recording with occasional level shifts that showcases a stellar Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain performance.
review: The tape is an audience source; listeners note good crowd clarity at the opening and only minor volume fluctuations in the first set. Musically the show shines, especially the seamless Scarlet > Fire sequence that several reviewers call one of the best they’ve heard. Overall the performance outweighs the modest recording quirks.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical praise (especially Scarlet > Fire) from most reviewers and generally favorable comments on sound quality, with only one outlier low rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear crowd intro and overall decent fidelity; a few reviewers note first‑set level fluctuations but most say it sounds better than other audience sources.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is praised for its energy and a particularly strong Scarlet > Fire sequence; flow is described as timeless and highly engaging.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his interplay with Phil, sounding like a conversation during the Scarlet/Fire segment.
band_member_comments.Phil: Highlighted alongside Jerry as a seamless musical dialogue on the standout songs.
